---
title: "Calculus"
description: "Core concepts in calculus with applications to Machine Learning and optimization."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "order asc"
---
## Topics

Core concepts in calculus with applications to Machine Learning and optimization.

> **Reference:** <https://www.coursera.org/learn/machine-learning-calculus>

### Notes
